name: Day After Thanksgiving Turkey Strudel
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 packages fresh spinach, destemmed and rinsed
2 1/2 cups leftover turkey, very finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
Steam spinach for 2 to 3 minutes; drain very well and cool. Mix together remaining filling ingredients; stir in spinach.
Place one sheet of phyllo on an ungreased cookie sheet (keep remaining phyllo under a damp towel to keep moist.) Brush with melted butter. Put on 3 more sheets; brush with butter. Place another sheet crosswise on top of the first four sheets; brush with butter. Top with remaining sheets, going in the same direction as the last sheet, and brush with butter.
Spoon filling onto the middle of the phyllo sheets. Bring the phyllo sheets up and over the filling and shape into a round shape. Make sure the phyllo encloses all of the filling (you can twist the top ends like a Hershey's Kiss or just leave them lying flat over the top). Brush with remaining butter.
Bake at 350°F for 50 minutes, or until golden brown. Cut into wedges to serve.
